text:
Created attachment 229287
Patch for jsoncpp

Update jsoncpp to 1.9.5 (bugfix release)
Drop static library

Compile and tested on FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #1 stable/13-n247667-dc9094140c9 (amd64) (make, make check-plist, make test)
Poudriere testport OK 12.2-RELEASE (amd64)
